user.title: Connect to Lemonade Server
user.description: Enter the Lemonade Server URL and optional API key.

config.title: Model & Parameters
config.description: Select the default model and configure generation parameters.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Lemonade Server

set_options.title: Lemonade Conversation Advanced
set_options.description: Configure model, context, behavior and timeouts for this agent.

data_description.model_name: LLM model loaded on the Lemonade server.
data_description.system_prompt: Base personality and behavior instructions for the assistant.
data_description.technical_prompt: Internal reasoning and tool-use instructions. Supports placeholders: {time}, {date}, {current_area}, {index}, {response_mode}.
data_description.context_templates: One Jinja2 template per line. Each is rendered and injected as dynamic context (e.g. 'Hora: {{ now().strftime("%H:%M") }}').
data_description.enabled_domains: Limit which domains the LLM can see and control.
data_description.entity_aliases: One per line, format: entity_id: alias (e.g. 'light.bedside: luz de mesita').
data_description.max_entities_per_discovery: Cap on entities returned per discovery call (20-500).
data_description.max_tokens: Maximum length of the generated response.
data_description.max_history: Number of recent conversation turns to keep as context.
data_description.response_mode: Controls follow-up questions and conversation ending behavior.
data_description.clean_responses: Strip emojis and special characters so the response is clean for text-to-speech.
data_description.control_home_assistant: Allow the LLM to call Home Assistant tools to control devices.
data_description.confirmation_required: Ask the user to confirm before performing any control action (turning devices on/off, running scripts, activating scenes).
data_description.expose_scripts: Give the LLM a 'run_script' tool to run Home Assistant scripts by entity_id.
data_description.expose_scenes: Give the LLM an 'activate_scene' tool to activate Home Assistant scenes by entity_id.
data_description.max_iterations: Maximum number of tool-call loops per response.
data_description.debug_mode: Log detailed prompts and tool calls to the Home Assistant log.
data_description.enable_streaming: Stream the response token-by-token. Uncheck to debug non-streaming fallback.
data_description.respect_exposure: Only access entities exposed to this assistant (Home Assistant default).
data_description.llm_hass_api: Which Home Assistant LLM API exposes tools to this agent.
data_description.enable_rag: Retrieve relevant home context from the local RAG index to answer questions.
data_description.rag_top_k: Number of context chunks retrieved for RAG.
data_description.follow_up_phrases: Comma-separated phrases the LLM may use to keep the conversation going.
data_description.end_words: Comma-separated words the user can say to end the conversation.
data_description.enable_web_search: Allow the LLM to search the web using your local SearXNG instance (fully self-hosted, no external API).
data_description.searxng_url: Base URL of your SearXNG instance (e.g. http://10.0.98.x:8080). JSON format must be enabled in its settings.yml.
data_description.searxng_engines: Optional comma-separated engines to restrict the search (e.g. google,duckduckgo). Leave empty for all.
data_description.searxng_max_results: Maximum number of search results returned to the LLM (1-20).
data_description.first_delta_timeout: Max wait for the first streamed token (falls back to non-streaming if exceeded).

set_options.title: Lemonade AI Task
set_options.description: Configure model and parameters for AI Task generation.

data_description.model_name: LLM model loaded on the Lemonade server.
data_description.system_prompt: Base instructions for AI Task generation.
data_description.max_tokens: Maximum length of the generated response.
